exception.message: Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Message: session not created: This version of ChromeDriver only supports Chrome version 141 Current browser version is 145.0.7632.76 with binary path C:\Program Files\Google\Chrome\Application\chrome.exe Host info: host: 'LIN65005926', ip: '192.168.29.44' Build info: version: '4.19.1', revision: 'abe0ee07dc' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.7' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [null, newSession {capabilities=[Capabilities {browserName: chrome, goog:chromeOptions: {args: [--start-maximized], extensions: []}}]}]
